name: 한국예탁결제원_금융용어조회서비스_GW

traffic.operating_traffic_note: 활용사례 등록시 신청하면 트래픽 증가 가능

approval.submitted_purpose: UMMAYA lookup adapter: financial term dictionary for citizen queries about securities, bonds, disclosure, settlement, and market terminology.

citizen_queries: Repo가 뭔지 공공기관 자료 기준으로 설명해줘.
채권 원리금 확정이라는 표현을 쉽게 풀어줘.
공시 문서에 나온 금융용어 뜻을 공식 정의로 찾아줘.
ummaya.fit_reason: This official Korea Securities Depository financial dictionary can answer citizen finance-term questions with an authoritative source. It is a support lookup adapter for securities, bond, disclosure, settlement, tax, and market-infrastructure conversations.

notes: The portal detail page showed a blank file identifier for the API-specific reference document link, so no API-specific reference document was downloadable.
Swagger produces application/xml; sanitize HTML tags in ksdFnceDictDescContent before returning to users.
Live endpoint probes should be direct curl probes with the approved data.go.kr key before a live adapter is implemented. CI must use recorded fixtures only.
